summary:
Implementation plan for building a sandbox/prototype UI that demonstrates the full Campaign → Link Ref → Project mapping lifecycle. Covers:

1. New TypeScript types for the enhanced domain model (SandboxProject, LinkRef, AdsCampaign, SyncEvent)
2. Comprehensive mock data with 5 projects, 8+ campaigns, 6+ link refs
3. React context store with reducer for state management and scenario loading
4. New route at /projects/sandbox with three-panel layout
5. 10+ new UI components including scenario menu, project list, modals for connect/migrate/edit, event log, sync animations
6. 12 clickable scenarios covering Create, Update, Delete, and Error edge cases
7. Premium dark-mode design with glassmorphism, Framer Motion animations, and color-coded status system
